questions: Figma diye ki ki kora jay
answers: Figma is a cloud-based design tool used for UI/UX design, prototyping, and collaboration. It works in the browser and allows real-time collaboration with team members.
Figma holo ekta online design tool — browser e chole, team er shathe real-time e collaborate kora jay. UI design, wireframe, prototype shob kora jay Figma diye.
Figma has a free tier for up to 3 projects. It supports components, auto-layout, plugins, and design systems. Learn frames, layers, and the pen tool to get started.
Figma is the industry standard for product design. Key features include components, variants, auto-layout, interactive prototyping, design tokens, and Dev Mode for developer handoff.
